notes: Observed fixtures can be live-verified by bounded read tools only.
Missing fixtures remain fixture-needed; this report does not build heatmaps or mutate analytics configuration.

target_fps.name: Number of frames processed per second

properties.name: Name
properties.description: Detection object name.

properties.name: Enable
properties.description: Use the selected detection algorithm

properties.name: Type
properties.description: Detector type.

properties.name: Video stream
properties.description: Select a video stream for detection.

properties.name: Period
properties.description: Time period in ms, after which the next frame will be processed. At "0", each of them will be processed.

properties.name: Number of frames processed per second
Decoder mode
properties.description: Device for video decoding

properties.name: Record object trajectories
properties.description: Enable recording of object trajectories to the corresponding database. Object trajectories are used for Search in archive.

properties.name: Track lifespan
properties.description: Show track lifespan for objects in seconds.

properties.name: Detection threshold
properties.description: Specify the threshold value, at which detection is triggered.

properties.name: Camera position
properties.description: Select the camera position from the list.

properties.name: Neural tracker mode
properties.description: Neural tracker operating mode.

properties.name: Neural network file
properties.description: Specify the path to the file of the neural network.

properties.name: Detection neural network
properties.description:
Select a detection neural network from the list.
Neural networks are named according to the objects they detect.
The names may indicate the size of the neural network.
The size (Nano, Medium, Large) of the neural network indicates the amount of resources consumed.
The larger the neural network, the higher the accuracy.

properties.name: Neural filter
properties.description: Enable the neural filter.

properties.name: Neural filter file
properties.description: Specify the path to the neural filter file.

properties.name: Selected object classes
properties.description: Specify the number values for object classes separated by a spaced comma.

properties.name: Similitude search
properties.description: This parameter enables/disables the algorithm of similitude search.

properties.name: Time of processing similitude tracks (sec)
properties.description: Specify the time (in seconds) required to process the track for the algorithm of similitude search. The recommended value must exceed the average lifespan of a track. The higher the value, the more accurate the result.

properties.name: Track retention time (sec)
properties.description: Specify the track retention time.

properties.name: Minimum number of detection triggers
properties.description: Specify the minimum number of detection triggers to display the track.

properties.name: Hide static objects
properties.description: Hide static objects from the detection area.

properties.name: Sensitivity of excluding static objects
properties.description: The higher the value, the less sensitive is the algorithm to motion.

properties.name: Time period of excluding static objects
properties.description: Specify the period of time in seconds, after which static objects will be no longer detected.

properties.name: Hide moving objects
properties.description: Hide moving objects from the detection area.

properties.name: Scanning mode
properties.description: Enable the scanning mode.

properties.name: Scanning window width
properties.description: Specify the width of the scanning window.

properties.name: Scanning window height
properties.description: Specify the height of the scanning window.

properties.name: Scanning window step width
properties.description: Specify the width of the scanning window step.

properties.name: Scanning window step height
properties.description: Specify the height of the scanning window step.

properties.name: Model quantization
properties.description: The parameter enables/disables network quantization. This allows to alleviate the network, use less accelerator computing power, but also slightly affects detection quality. This parameter works only with GPU mode enabled.

properties.name: Type
properties.description: Detector type.

properties.name: Ignore area
properties.description: Area for ignoring detection triggering.

properties.name: Detection area (polygon)
properties.description: Polygonal area for detection triggering.

properties.name: Name
properties.description: Detection object name.

properties.name: Type
properties.description: Detector type.

properties.name: Type
properties.description: Detector type.
